header.headline: Prompt to SVG Pipeline
header.subtitle: A minimal compiler-backed path from user intent to a saved infographic.

stage_1.title: Prompt Intent
stage_1.body: Capture the task, audience, and desired output boundary.

stage_2.title: Family Router
stage_2.body: Choose the correct bounded visual family before planning.

stage_3.title: Layout Planner
stage_3.body: Assemble the reusable scene structure and control bundle.

stage_4.title: Compiler
stage_4.body: Lower the scene plan into deterministic SVG-ready structure.

footer.title: Design Rule
footer.body: Keep the path deterministic end to end so the model learns one bounded system board rather than freeform diagrams.
